overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a waterfront promenade in a futuristic city at sunset, transitioning from an open boardwalk area with shipping containers and tents, through a covered colonnade with construction scaffolding, past the entrance of the Pacifica Hotel, and finally entering a dark, dilapidated hotel lobby. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and detailed environmental storytelling.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit waterfront boardwalk at golden hour, featuring a yellow shipping container and striped tent on the right, with a ferris wheel and construction cranes visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past wooden deck furniture, transitioning into a covered colonnade area with large stone columns.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered colonnade with large stone columns, the scene features construction scaffolding and materials on the right side. The camera passes a pedestrian walking the opposite way and observes vehicles passing on the parallel road. The ferris wheel remains visible in the distance to the left as the path continues forward.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Pacifica Hotel entrance, passing under the covered walkway with the hotel's teal neon sign and advertisement screen visible on the left. The golden double doors of the entrance come into view at the end of a purple carpet, while the construction scaffolding and ferris wheel recede from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dilapidated hotel lobby with checkered floors

events.description: enters the Pacifica Hotel through the golden double doors
dramatic shift from bright sunset to dark, moody interior lighting with dust motes visible in light beams

agents.ego_description: entering the dark hotel lobby and walking toward the reception desk area

illuminated green emergency exit sign above a doorway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Pacifica Hotel through the golden doors, transitioning dramatically from the bright sunset to a dark, abandoned lobby. The space features checkered marble floors, a large reception desk surrounded by debris, velvet rope barriers, and atmospheric dust illuminated by warm wall sconces. The camera moves deeper into the dilapidated interior, revealing a staircase and emergency exit signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit waterfront promenade into the dark, decaying interior of a luxury hotel. It begins on a golden-hour boardwalk past a yellow shipping container and striped tent, moving forward as the open air gives way to a covered colonnade of massive stone columns. As the camera progresses under this walkway, the bright exterior light blends with the shadows of construction scaffolding and passing traffic, while a distant ferris wheel slowly recedes from view. The scene then shifts toward the Pacifica Hotel entrance, passing a teal neon sign and a purple carpet that leads directly to a set of golden double doors. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold, transitioning dramatically from the warm sunset into a dilapidated lobby characterized by checkered marble floors, debris-strewn reception desks, and dim wall sconces.
